product_overview: Saral One is a technology-driven business services platform designed to help startups, MSMEs, and enterprises build, scale, and operate efficiently through a suite of integrated technology solutions, system management, automation, compliance, and professional advisory services delivered under one unified platform.
core_goals: Provide an integrated platform that consolidates business automation, compliance, technology, and consultancy services to eliminate manual efforts and vendor complexity.
Enable structured and scalable business operations through automation, CRM, lead generation, custom software, and system integration.
Deliver a user-friendly, modern, and responsive website that clearly communicates Saral One's value propositions and service offerings to startups and businesses.
Facilitate easy user engagement and lead conversion through clear CTAs, consultation booking, and informative content.
Build trust and credibility with customers by showcasing client testimonials, security features, and expert advisory services.
key_features: Comprehensive landing page sections including Hero, Pain Points, How It Works, Audit Score, One-Click Setup, Reviews Management, Post Scheduler, Website Builder, Pricing, Testimonials, Security, Support, FAQ, Final Call-to-Action, and Footer.
Responsive header navigation with dropdown menus, search modal, and mobile hamburger menu to enhance user navigation across devices.
Animated dashboard preview in the hero section to visually engage visitors and demonstrate platform capabilities.
AI chatbot feature for interactive user assistance and quick query resolution.
Scroll progress indicator and floating action buttons for improved site usability and engagement.
Robust UI component library based on Radix UI and shadcn/ui ensuring consistent design and accessibility.
Keyboard navigation support for improved accessibility and efficient page section browsing.
Comprehensive SEO implementation including meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, and structured data for enhanced search engine visibility and social sharing.
Mobile-first responsive design ensuring seamless experience across phones, tablets, and desktops.
Smooth Framer Motion animations for engaging visual transitions and interactions.
user_flow_summary: User lands on the homepage greeted by an animated hero section featuring Saral One’s value proposition and clear CTAs to book consultations or explore services.
Users navigate the site via a responsive header menu offering dropdowns, search functionality, and a mobile-optimized hamburger menu.
Visitors explore detailed service offerings and how Saral One solves common business pain points through visual sections and process walkthroughs.
Users engage with interactive elements like the AI chatbot or submit inquiries through contact options.
Visitors review pricing plans, testimonials, and security assurances to build trust and confidence.
Users conclude their journey by clicking strong CTAs to book consultations or seek further support.
404 page handles unmatched routes with user-friendly messaging to guide users back.
Consistent support is offered throughout the site via footer links, contact details, and social media connections.
validation_criteria: All landing page sections must load correctly and display content aligned with the brand messaging.
Header navigation must be fully responsive, with dropdown and mobile menus functioning seamlessly on all devices.
The animated dashboard in the hero section should animate smoothly without performance issues.
AI chatbot interface must respond accurately and helpfully to user inputs.
SEO meta tags and structured data should be correctly applied and verifiable through SEO tools.
Keyboard navigation must allow users to navigate page sections efficiently using arrow keys and vim-style shortcuts.
Toast notifications and floating action buttons should work consistently across user interactions.
The website should pass accessibility standards for keyboard usability and screen reader compatibility.
Responsive design must maintain usability and visual integrity across all device sizes and orientations.
All CTAs, especially consultation booking links, should redirect correctly and track user engagement metrics.
